Off Calendar Oct-09-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Kimberly J. Chu of BRAYTON & PURCELL LLP (415-898-1555), appearing for plaintiffs / moving parties Roger Henderson and Lynn Brazel, et al. in #275781 and #276272

RULING:
PLAINTIFFS ROGER HENDERSON, LYNN BRAZEL, ET AL.'S MOTION FOR ORDER TO CONSOLIDATE ACTIONS FOR ALL PURPOSES INCLUDING TRIAL

No other appearance and tentative ruling adopted: Plaintiffs' motion to consolidate actions for all purposes including trial is granted. No opposition filed. Cases numbered 275781 and 276272 are consolidated. Henceforth all papers shall be filed under the lead case no. 275781. One order for both cases signed in open court. Judge: Teri L. Jackson, Matter not reported (503/TLJ)
